headline: The Kortz Center Heist Is Live - New Art Gallery Heist (Title Update 1.73)
quickTake: NEW DLC: The Kortz Center Heist is live — plan the art heist from a Mansion Art Studio
GTA+: claim the free Grotti Veleno GT at the Vinewood Car Club before July 21
Pre-launch rewards (GTA$500K + GTA$1M + vehicles) hit your deliveries within 72 hours
Six new cars at launch — full launch-week bonuses & discounts land soon

sections.title: New DLC: The Kortz Center Heist

items.label: Check your deliveries: pre-launch rewards (GTA$500K + Turreted Limo for logging in, GTA$1M + NOOSE Outfit for any heist, extra gifts for mansion owners) arrive within 72 hours of July 13
GTA+ members: claim the free Grotti Veleno GT (GTA$3,000,000 value) at the Vinewood Car Club before July 21
Hosting the heist? Buy a Mansion via Dynasty 8 — Tongva Estate, Vinewood Residence or Richman Villa, from GTA$11.5M
Add the Art Studio expansion (GTA$4.7M — as low as GTA$2.7M with the Elitist and GTA+ discounts) to unlock the heist planning board
Run The Kortz Center Heist (solo or up to 4 players) — three new paintings rotate every week, so it repeats as a money-maker
No mansion? Join a friend's Kortz Center Heist crew — only the host needs the property
Launch-week 2x/3x bonuses are still rolling out — check back soon
This week's Weekly Challenge lands with the launch event post — check back soon
GTA+ (July 14 - August 12): free Black Oil Spill Prismatic Chameleon Paint and matching wheel paint
Podium Vehicle & LS Car Meet Prize Ride for launch week TBA
Launch-week discounts drop with the event post — check back soon
Gun Van launch-week rotation TBA
New: Grotti Cartuccia GT - GTA$2,395,000 (Legendary Motorsport)
New: Benefactor LRC GT - GTA$2,650,000
New: Ocelot E-Stride - GTA$1,425,000
New: Albany Merula - GTA$1,394,000
New: Benefactor Läufer - GTA$645,000
New: Vapid Caracara (Armored) - price TBC in-game
Grotti Veleno GT goes on sale for everyone July 23 - GTA$3,000,000
Rockstar Mission Creator improvements ship with Title Update 1.73

beginnerPath.label: Start by joining a friend's Kortz Center Heist crew — only the host needs a mansion.
Check your deliveries: the GTA$500,000 pre-launch login bonus arrives within 72 hours.
Keep working toward the Kosatka — Cayo Perico is still the best solo money for new players.

locations.activity: New DLC: The Kortz Center Heist
locations.name: Kortz Center
locations.note: The heist target. Your first setup is a recon trip here once the planning board unlocks.

locations.activity: New DLC: The Kortz Center Heist
locations.name: Dynasty 8 website (in-game phone)
locations.note: Buy a Mansion (from GTA$11.5M) — required to host the heist — then add the Art Studio expansion (GTA$4.7M, cheaper with Elitist/GTA+ discounts).

locations.activity: New DLC: The Kortz Center Heist
locations.name: Art Studio (mansion basement)
locations.note: First visit triggers the intro cutscene with Mr. Faber and Raf, then the heist planning board unlocks.

locations.activity: New DLC: The Kortz Center Heist
locations.name: Vinewood Car Club
locations.note: GTA+ members claim the free Grotti Veleno GT here through July 21.
